description:
The `estimate_bundle_size` tool's package-name derivation heuristic is undocumented — users don't know what value to pass for `packageName` or how the tool determines the npm package name when it's not provided.

**Fix:** Add a note in the README tools reference (and/or JSDoc on the tool handler) explaining the derivation logic (e.g., reads `name` field from `package.json`, falls back to CEM package name).

**Acceptance criteria:**
- README tools reference explains what `packageName` accepts and how it's derived
- Users can understand what to pass without reading source code
title: fix: document estimate_bundle_size package derivation logic
